summary: Chantier 3 SAFe - Tests complets backend (15/15) et frontend (tous flows). API Trains/PIs/Sprints/Capabilities/Overview/CRUD toutes fonctionnelles. Phase transitions (valid + invalid 422 + history). Frontend: Trains SAFe page complète, Task Tree View Phoenix, Capability modal CRUD, non-régression projets plats.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: VALID_TRANSITIONS 'review' allows going back to 'backlog' (backtrack possible) - by design for anti-rollback checks, terminal states done/rejected are correctly blocked
OK: TaskCreate requires 'type' field (non-optional) - tests initially failed because type was omitted, fixed in test code
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data (1 train ART Digital Banking, 2 PIs, 4 sprints, 5 capabilities)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chantier 3 SAFe entier testé et validé. Trains page: /safe/trains avec data-testid=trains-safe-page, titre TRAINS SAFE, ART Digital Banking avec KPIs 2PIS/4SPRINTS/5CAPABILITIES/3EQUIPES. PI-1 2026 actif avec Sprint 1.1 et 1.2, capabilities board 4 colonnes. Phoenix (PRJ-2025-001) a vue Arbre SAFe avec badges FEATURE/USER STORY. SAP/Azure: bouton Arbre SAFe absent (correct). Phase transitions: backlog->review OK, backlog->done 422 'non autorisée'. Non-regression: all previous features (Vendors, Resources, Profiles) still working.

feature_verification.3a_trains_api: PASS - 1 train ART Digital Banking, pi_count=2, team_ids=[3 équipes]
feature_verification.3a_capabilities_api: PASS - 5 capabilities (Onboarding, API Gateway, Score, DORA, Batch)
feature_verification.3b_task_hierarchy: PASS - Phoenix tasks have feature/user_story levels, user_stories have parent_id
feature_verification.3d_valid_transition: PASS - backlog->review returns {task, history_entry} with from_phase=backlog, to_phase=review
feature_verification.3d_phase_history: PASS - GET phase-history returns list after transition
feature_verification.3f_trains_safe_page: PASS - /safe/trains, trains-safe-page testid, TRAINS SAFE title, ART Digital Banking visible
feature_verification.3f_pi_panel: PASS - PI-1 2026 active, objectifs, Sprint 1.1+1.2 avec vélocité, capabilities 4 colonnes
feature_verification.3f_capability_crud_ui: PASS - +Ajouter button, modal opens, data-testid=cap-form-name present
feature_verification.3c_task_tree_view: PASS - task-view-tree-btn visible Phoenix, task-tree-view renders with FEATURE(3) and USER STORY(4) badges
feature_verification.3c_view_toggles: PASS - Liste, Gantt, Arbre SAFe buttons in task-view-toggle
feature_verification.sidebar_safe: PASS - nav-trains-safe visible for admin, text='Trains SAFe'
feature_verification.non_regression_flat_projects: PASS - SAP project: only Liste+Gantt buttons, no Arbre SAFe
